app.staleSelectionRemoved: {{count}} document(s) no longer exist and were removed from selection
app.lastSelectionRestoredPartial: Restored last selection of {{count}} doc(s) ({{missing}} missing)
app.cmdkHint: Press ⌘K to search documents across all projects

empty.title: Read your markdown documents in one place
empty.description: Add a project folder and Markwand will automatically collect all .md files inside.

loading.workspaceDetail: Scanning the folder and locating projects (.git, package.json, …).
loading.filesLoadingRemote: Remote servers may take a moment.
loading.timeoutDetail: No response after 25 seconds. The network may have changed, or the remote server is unreachable. Retry or switch to another workspace.
loading.switchHint: You can also switch to another workspace from the menu above.

productGuide.openTitle: See Markwand's intent and core features
productGuide.title: See what matters first, even when docs pile up
productGuide.intro: When AI notes, plans, and meeting docs keep growing, filenames are not enough. Markwand turns them into reading order, open issues, and next actions.

why.title: Why it exists
why.body: Markwand gathers scattered docs so a new teammate can understand the project flow without reading everything first.

wiki.title: Project Wiki
wiki.body: Docs are grouped into Quick Summary (Project Brief), Document Groups (Knowledge Map), Decision History (Decision Log), and Issues to Check (Risk Board). Users can understand the plain meaning first while learning Markwand's product language.

search.title: Quick find
search.body: Press ⌘K to search filenames, document text, and status. Remote SSH docs are read with caches and small read budgets to stay responsive.

handoff.title: Send to AI · AI Handoff
handoff.body: Copy the current project summary and paste it into Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, or another AI tool without explaining the project from scratch.

trust.title: Check document health · Trust & Drift
trust.body: Broken links, stale content, and missing details are surfaced before you rely on a document for decisions.

ssh.title: Read-only SSH
ssh.body: Remote server docs can be read from the desktop app, but Markwand stays read-only and only reads what it needs.

tips.cmdk: Press ⌘K to find documents across the projects currently loaded.
tips.wiki: Use the project wiki to see plain labels and Markwand concept names together.
tips.ssh: Remote SSH docs can be slower; opening a project first warms the document cache and keeps search light.
tips.handoff: Use Send to AI in the sidebar to copy the current project summary.

aiHandoff.copyAria: Copy the current project summary for an AI tool
aiHandoff.copySuccess: Copied the project summary for AI.
aiHandoff.copyError: Could not copy the project summary.

inbox.emptyAll: No markdown documents in this workspace yet, or still loading.

allProjects.selectWorkspaceDesc: Pick a workspace at the top to see its projects.
allProjects.notFoundDesc: Clear filters or try a different workspace.

projectView.selectFile: Select a document from the file list on the left
projectView.selectFileDesc: Click a document or image to open it here.

recentDocs.title: Recent (7 days)
recentDocs.tablistAria: Switch between recent docs and images

projectWiki.title: {{name}} Wiki
projectWiki.summary: {{docs}} markdown docs, {{recent}} changed in the last 7 days. Tracking {{missing}} broken links and {{stale}} stale references.

git.title: Recent Change Flow · Git Pulse
git.activeSummary: Recent commits and uncommitted work show where this project is moving right now.
git.quietSummary: No strong Git activity signal right now. The document map is safe to read first.

dirtyWork.title: Work is still in progress
dirtyWork.detail: There are uncommitted changes. Capture the current intent before handing this to AI.

operationalCheck.title: Check operational docs
operationalCheck.detail: {{file}} changed, so confirm whether {{doc}} is still the execution guide. Operational docs carry higher risk.

currentGuideCheck.title: Check the current guide
currentGuideCheck.detail: Code is moving actively and {{doc}} is {{age}} days old. Only check newcomer-facing assumptions, not historical plans.

referenceCheck.title: Check reference docs
referenceCheck.detail: {{file}} may connect to reference doc {{doc}}. Confirm only if the doc is used as current guidance.

decisionTrace.title: Plan may have execution traces
decisionTrace.detail: Recent commits may be execution traces of {{doc}}. Preserve it as context unless it claims to be current guidance.

projectWiki.briefEmpty: No useful document body found for a brief yet.
projectWiki.copyHandoffError: Could not copy the AI summary.
projectWiki.copyOnboardingBriefAria: Copy an onboarding brief for a new collaborator
projectWiki.copyOnboardingBriefError: Could not copy the onboarding brief.
projectWiki.knowledgeEmpty: No document roles to map yet.
projectWiki.roleMapEmpty: No documents available for role judgment yet.
projectWiki.docDebtTitle: Docs to Clean Up · Doc Debt Radar
projectWiki.trustTitle: Can I Trust This? · Trust Diagnosis
projectWiki.trustSignalsEmpty: No major signals are lowering trust right now.

trustSummary.strong: Project docs look reasonably trustworthy. The suggested reading path is safe to start with.
trustSummary.watch: The document flow is visible, but a few evidence signals need review before relying on it fully.
trustSummary.weak: Docs are stale or risky enough that cleanup should come before major decisions.

repairReferences.title: Repair the broken document flow first
repairReferences.desc: Restoring link trust before asking AI to summarize will make every downstream task sharper.

refreshStaleDocs.title: Review only freshness-sensitive docs
refreshStaleDocs.desc: Keep old plans as records, and prioritize docs people still follow now, like README, deploy, and ops guides.

completeMetadata.title: Clean up document shape to make the wiki smarter
completeMetadata.desc: Adding source/status metadata improves document groups, filters, and AI task suggestions together.

buildOnboardingBrief.title: Turn the reading path into an onboarding brief
buildOnboardingBrief.desc: A one-page guide helps new humans and AI collaborators join the project much faster.

extractDecisionTimeline.title: Extract the decision timeline
extractDecisionTimeline.desc: Plans and design notes are ready to become a chronological view of decisions, changes, and open questions.

readFirst.title: Follow the reading path next
readFirst.desc: No major risk is blocking you, so the suggested start docs are safe to read for project context.

pulse.copyPromptAria: Copy the suggested AI task for the current project state

projectWiki.linkGraphSummary: Read {{refs}} links across {{checked}} checked docs and track {{risky}} risky links.
projectWiki.linkGraphEmpty: Open documents and run Drift checks to populate the link relationship graph.
projectWiki.linkGraphHubsEmpty: No connected hub documents found yet.
projectWiki.linkGraphRiskLinksEmpty: No risky links to show right now.
projectWiki.aiTasksTitle: Good Tasks for AI · AI Task Suggestions
projectWiki.aiTasksEmpty: No AI tasks to suggest yet.
projectWiki.copyTaskPromptError: Could not copy the task prompt.

repairReferences.title: Repair document references
repairReferences.desc: Fix broken or stale references first to recover document trust.

refreshStaleDocs.title: Review freshness-sensitive docs
refreshStaleDocs.desc: Check current guides and operational docs while separating old plans and records from forced updates.

completeMetadata.title: Normalize document metadata
completeMetadata.desc: Add source/status metadata so document groups, filters, and AI task suggestions become more reliable.

buildOnboardingBrief.title: Write an onboarding brief
buildOnboardingBrief.desc: Turn the starting documents into a short guide for a new collaborator.

extractDecisionTimeline.title: Extract a decision timeline
extractDecisionTimeline.desc: Summarize decision flow and unresolved questions from plan, design, and review docs.

projectWiki.emptyDesc: Project overview and reading paths will appear once markdown docs are available.
projectWiki.riskEmpty: No document reference issues detected right now.
projectWiki.decisionsEmpty: No plan, design, or review docs found yet.

docRoleHint.currentGuide: People follow this now, so freshness matters.
docRoleHint.operational: Deploy, ops, and migration instructions carry real execution risk.
docRoleHint.reference: Explains structure or usage, so mismatches should be checked.
docRoleHint.decisionRecord: Preserves why decisions happened; it is not always meant to be rewritten.
docRoleHint.workLog: Plans and sprint notes can be read as historical context.
docRoleHint.tooling: Agent and automation setup docs are separated from first-read project truth.
docRoleHint.archive: Preserved history; alerts here should stay low priority.
docRoleHint.ideaDraft: Early proposals or ideas are judged separately from execution docs.

tabs.projectTitle: File tree and documents for the selected project

picker.addSshAria: Add a remote SSH server folder

settings.title: Settings
settings.trackReadDocsHint: Turning this off marks all documents as unread and clears history
settings.confirmClear: Delete all read history and turn off tracking?
settings.sshTransportHint: Browse markdown on remote servers (read-only). <1>Restart the app</1> after changing.
settings.sshTransportTitle: Enables read-only remote SSH workspaces. Restart the app after changing.

ssh.purgeOption: Also delete SSH data (host keys & SSH workspaces)
ssh.purgeConfirm: Delete SSH data? This cannot be undone.

manage.title: Manage workspaces
manage.removeSshDataHint: Saved host key will be removed

project.driftTitle: {{missing}} broken links · {{stale}} stale refs to review — document references need attention

imageViewer.loadFailedDetail: The file may have been moved or you don't have permission.

cmdk.noWorkspaceHint: Add a workspace from the sidebar to search documents with ⌘K
cmdk.noResultsHint: Try different keywords or a file path

claudeCli.notFoundDetail: Claude CLI is not installed or not in your PATH.

composer.onboardingBody: Check multiple files, then send them to Claude Code / Codex in one step via the Composer at the bottom.

composerOnboarding.body: Send multiple documents to your AI tool at once. Requires a developer tool (Claude Code · Codex).

step1.title: Folder = workspace
step1.body: Add any folder containing markdown files to create a workspace.

step2.title: Folder with .git or package.json = project
step2.body: Markwand automatically groups folders with project markers into projects.

step3.title: Press ESC to close
step3.body: You can close this guide at any time by pressing ESC.

drift.staleTitle: {{count}} to review — referenced file changed after the document
drift.copyIssuesTitle: Copy broken links / stale review items as an AI prompt (includes doc path, line number, and instructions)
drift.missingDetail: — the file referenced in the document is missing. It may be a typo, rename, or deletion. Use <1>Jump to location</1> to find and fix the reference in the document, or choose <3>Ignore</3> if unsolvable.
drift.staleDetail: — this is a review signal, not necessarily an error: the referenced <1>file</1> changed after the document. Review the change and update the document, or choose <3>Ignore</3> if it is still fine. (Folder paths are excluded from stale checks because their mtime changes frequently.)
drift.folderTitle: This path is a directory — folders are excluded from stale checks because mtime changes with internal edits.
drift.jumpTitle: Jump directly to this reference in the document without opening search
drift.badgeStaleTitle: {{count}} referenced files were modified after the document — review

prompt.intro: The references below have issues. Open the document and propose fixes.
prompt.missingHeading: ## ✕ missing ({{count}}) — file not found (typo, rename, or deletion possible)
prompt.staleHeading: ## ◐ stale ({{count}}) — file modified after the document (check if content needs update)
prompt.closing: For missing: fix paths or reflect deletions. For stale: decide whether to update document content.
prompt.closingMissing: For missing: decide whether to fix paths or reflect deletions.
prompt.closingStale: For stale: decide whether to update document content.

add.title: Add a remote SSH folder
add.description: Browse a markdown folder on a remote server. Read-only — nothing is sent or changed on the server.
add.configProxyJumpNote: This host uses a ProxyJump. Only basic fields are auto-filled in this screen.
add.configEmpty: The SSH config file exists but has no usable hosts.
add.name: Name
add.userPlaceholder: Remote user to log in as
add.authAgentHint: Uses your ssh-agent. If <1>ssh {{user}}@{{host}}</1> works in your terminal, this method works too.
add.authKeyFileHint: Provide the path to a private key file used for connection.
add.keyPathHint: Only the file path is stored. The key contents are not saved in the app.
add.rootHint: Point to the folder containing markdown documents. You may type it or use <1>Browse</1>.
add.modeNote: The selected folder will be registered as one project. Only one remote folder can be added per entry.

picker.title: Folder browser
picker.errHostUser: Enter the server address and account first.
picker.errKey: Enter the key file path before browsing.

prompt.titleNew: First time connecting to this server
prompt.descMismatch: The stored server fingerprint no longer matches. The server may have been reinstalled, or someone could be intercepting (MITM). Verify with the server administrator.
prompt.descNew: You've never trusted this server before. Confirm the fingerprint below matches the value given by your server administrator.
prompt.noticeNew: <1>Trusting saves this fingerprint.</1> Future connections will be automatic — no more prompts. You can remove it later in settings.
prompt.noticeMismatch: If the server was reinstalled: remove it from workspace management and re-add it to trust the new fingerprint.
prompt.fingerprintAria: SHA256 fingerprint {{value}}. Verify visually with your server administrator.

error.sshTransportDisabled: The SSH feature is disabled. Go to Settings (⚙) → Beta features → "Remote SSH server" and restart the app.
error.sshWorkspaceExists: This account/server combination is already registered.
error.invalidRoot: Folder path must be absolute (starting with /) and at least two levels deep (e.g. /home/user/docs).
error.connRefused: Connection refused. Check the server address / port and make sure the server is running.
error.connTimeout: Connection timed out. Check your network or firewall.
error.hostUnreachable: Server not found. Verify the address (hostname or IP).
error.authFailed: Authentication failed. Check the account name and authentication method (automatic login or key file path).
error.hostKeyRejected: The server fingerprint was not trusted — connection cancelled.
error.hostKeyMismatch: The server fingerprint differs from the stored value. Verify with the administrator and remove the old fingerprint in settings.
error.keyFileMissing: Key file not found. Check the path.

drift.fileTooLarge: File too large to validate references (>2MB).

annotation.sshUnsupported: Highlights on remote documents aren't supported yet. Coming in v0.5.
annotation.fileTooLarge: Highlight data is too large (>2MB). Remove some highlights and try again.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong in this area
errorBoundary.body: This may be a temporary error. Try one of the options below.

composer.pathWarning: Absolute paths included — be cautious when sharing externally

annotation.saveFailed: Couldn't save the highlight. Please try again.
